metadata.subject: History & Civics
metadata.description: Master question bank derived from past papers (2022-23 to 2024-25). standalone_questions contains individual questions with type and marks. context_groups contains linked sub-questions sharing a common stimulus (image / map / quote / thematic prompt); each sub-question has individual marks and the group has a total_marks field.
metadata.enrichment_notes: Years normalized to YYYY-YY academic format. Difficulty assigned by (type, marks) rule. Bloom level assigned by verb-pattern match with type-based fallback.
